description: Itemized bill from seller to buyer; required for all international shipments; must show value, terms, parties.
Detailed list of contents, weights, and dimensions of each package.
Transport contract and receipt; B/L for sea freight, AWB for air.

issuing_authority: Chamber of Commerce or designated authority
description: Declares country where goods were produced; required for many trade agreements and tariff preferences.
10-digit code mandatory for any Indian entity engaged in import/export.
Filed electronically via ICEGATE for export clearance from India.
Filed for goods imported into India; assesses duties.

issuing_authority: National plant protection organization (e.g., Plant Quarantine, India)
description: Confirms plant material is free from pests and diseases; required for most agricultural exports.
Required for tea and other plant-derived products.
Required for rice and other cereal exports.
Required for wheat exports.

issuing_authority: Drug regulator of exporting country (CDSCO in India, FDA in US)
description: Proof of manufacturing under Good Manufacturing Practices; required by most importing regulators.

document_name: FDA Prior Notice & Drug Establishment Registration
description: Foreign drug facilities exporting finished pharmaceuticals to the US must register with FDA.

issuing_authority: Kimberley Process Certifying Authority of exporting country
description: Mandatory for international shipments of rough diamonds; certifies non-conflict origin.

issuing_authority: Bureau of Indian Standards (for IN); national assay office elsewhere
description: Certifies precious metal purity; mandatory for retail gold jewellery in India and several markets.

issuing_authority: Independent inspection (SGS, Bureau Veritas) at loading port
description: Specifies API gravity, sulphur content, and origin; basis for buyer pricing and customs.
EU REACH regulation: textiles must not contain restricted substances above thresholds.
Economic Operator Registration and Identification — importer in EU must provide EORI.
ISF must be filed 24 hours before vessel loading at foreign port for ocean shipments to US.
Declarations for textile imports including fiber content and country of origin.
